title: Guidance on fees for the review of human and disinfectant drug submissions and applications: Who to contact - Canada.ca
content:
## Guidance on evaluation fees for human drugs and disinfectants: Who to contact
- Invoicing, fee payment and mitigation measures
- Credit for missed performance standards
- Applicable fees and fee groupings
Health Canada is available Monday to Friday from 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. (EST) and closed on statutory holidays. We will respond to your emails within 10 business days.
Please send your queries to:
Office of Submissions and Intellectual Property Email: cost.recovery@hc-sc.gc.ca
For payment inquiries:
Accounts Receivable Chief Financial Officer Branch Address Locator: 1918B 18th Floor, Room 1804B, Jeanne-Mance Building 161 Goldenrod Driveway, Tunney's Pasture Ottawa ON K1A 0K9 Email: ar-cr@hc-sc.gc.ca Phone: 613-957-1052 or 1-800-815-0506 Fax: 613-957-3495
